title: Customers With Mixed Order Values
description: Find customers who have placed at least one order above 300 and at least one order below 100. Return the customer id.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING MAX(amount) > 300 AND MIN(amount) < 100;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

result = (
    orders.groupBy("customer_id")
    .agg(
        max("amount").alias("max_amount"),
        min("amount").alias("min_amount")
    )
    .filter((col("max_amount") > 300) & (col("min_amount") < 100))
    .select("customer_id")
)
